overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing an FBI agent investigating a crime scene in a foggy Pacific Northwest forest. The character walks along a muddy trail past police tape, discovers a locked gate blocking the path, takes an alternate route over fallen logs, and meets her partner near a parked vehicle at the investigation site.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy forest trail approaching crime scene

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest trail toward a gated entrance marked with police tape

entered.detail: yellow crime scene tape wrapped around tree trunk marking investigation boundary
tall evergreen trees forming dense canopy overhead
muddy trail winding through the woods
metal chain link fence blocking the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an FBI agent walking along a narrow forest trail marked with yellow police tape. The path winds through dense evergreen trees with limited visibility due to fog. The character approaches a chain link gate blocking the way forward.

events.description: character attempts to open gate and discovers it is locked with a padlock
character turns around to backtrack and find an alternate route around the obstruction

agents.ego_description: attempting to open the locked gate, then turning back when it won't open to find another way

entered.detail: metal posts supporting the chain link fence on either side
locked padlock securing the gate closed

segments.scene_description: The agent reaches the chain link gate and attempts to open it, finding it secured with a padlock. After confirming it's locked, the character turns around to backtrack and find an alternate path through the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: alternate forest path with fallen obstacles

events.description: character climbs over large fallen logs blocking the alternate path

agents.ego_description: navigating over fallen logs and through dense undergrowth to bypass the locked gate

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunks blocking the path that must be climbed over
dark colored vehicle parked in the forest clearing ahead
opening in the forest with less dense vegetation and more sky visibility

segments.scene_description: Taking an alternate route, the agent climbs over large fallen logs blocking the path. The terrain becomes rougher as the character approaches a forest clearing where a vehicle is parked and another agent is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: crime scene clearing with wooden structure

events.description: character meets partner FBI agent at the investigation site

agents.ego_description: walking alongside partner agent toward the crime scene investigation area near the wooden structure

notable_agents.action: FBI partner walking ahead toward the crime scene investigation site

entered.detail: male FBI agent wearing matching blue jacket with yellow lettering
small wooden building or cabin at the edge of the clearing

segments.scene_description: The agent emerges into a clearing and meets her partner, another FBI agent. They walk together toward a wooden cabin structure near a parked vehicle, continuing the investigation of the crime scene in the foggy forest clearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, foggy forest that gradually opens into a wider crime scene clearing. It begins with an FBI agent navigating a narrow trail marked by yellow police tape, winding through thick evergreen trees until the path is obstructed by a padlocked chain link gate. After the agent confirms the gate is secured and turns back, the camera follows her as she deviates from the trail, climbing over large fallen logs across increasingly rough terrain. The scene then expands as the agent emerges from the woods into a clearing where a parked vehicle and a partner await. Finally, the two agents walk together toward a wooden cabin structure, continuing their investigation under the persistent forest fog.
